title: Tofu Basque Gratin
description: A creamy, French-inspired gratin made with pan-seared tofu and a delicate Basque sauce.

ingredients.name: Gratin cheese
ingredients.notes: a mix of cheddar and parmesan

instructions: Press and drain the tofu, then cut it into 1-inch cubes.
Pan-fry the tofu in olive oil until golden brown on all sides.
In a separate pan, sauté the garlic and thyme in a little olive oil until fragrant.
Add the Basque sauce and stir to combine.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of Basque sauce.
Arrange the tofu cubes on top of the sauce.
Sprinkle the gratin cheese over the tofu.
Repeat the layers one more time, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
